thought.text:
Now I understand the format:
- `^I` is TAB
- `[StartOfLine]` has a space before it and TAB after it: ` [StartOfLine]\t`
- `[LeadingSpace]` has a space before it and TAB after it: ` [LeadingSpace]\t`
- When no flags, there are two TABs: `\t\t`

Let me fix the main.cpp:

tool_call.name: terminal
